publication.title: Pharmacokinetic-pharmacodynamic modeling of ipamorelin, a growth hormone releasing peptide, in human volunteers

study_design: Dose-escalation trial using five intravenous infusion rates, with eight healthy male subjects at each level.
intervention_or_exposure: Fifteen-minute intravenous infusions across five escalating study-dose levels.
outcomes: Clearance was reported as 0.078 L/h/kg and steady-state volume as 0.22 L/kg.
GH response showed a single peak at approximately 0.67 hours followed by decline.
Ipamorelin stimulated GH release at all tested study levels.
limitations: PK/PD modelling study, not efficacy evidence.
permitted_claims: Ipamorelin has direct human PK/PD evidence showing a short half-life and episodic GH response.
prohibited_claims: Chronic wellness, muscle-gain or fat-loss efficacy claims.
